title: Optometry Practitioner (Fees, Charges and Forms) Regulations, 2011
title_en: Optometry Practitioner (Fees, Charges and Forms) Regulations, 2011

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Optometry Practitioner (Fees, Charges and Forms) Regulations, 2011 and shall come into operation on the date of publication.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations unless context requires otherwise— “ Act ” means the Optometry Act.

provisions.title: Payment of fees
provisions.content: (1) Every person who has been provisionally, temporarily or fully registered, enrolled, or licensed under Part III of the Act shall be required to pay a prescribed fee. (2) The fees set out in the First Schedule to these Regulations shall be payable in respect of the matter set out thereof. (3) Any supervisor shall be responsible for recording of payment of fees made under the Act . (4) All fees shall be paid in a Bank Account chosen by the Council and a person who paid such a fees shall submit to the supervisor the payment slip as an evidence that he has paid the required fees. (5) Any prescribed fee under these Regulations shall be paid on the due date.

provisions.title: Penalty
provisions.content: A person who fails to pay any prescribed fee after three months from the due date, shall be required to pay such fee and a penalty of fifty percent of the total sum of the prescribed fee.

provisions.title: Suspension and cancellation
provisions.content: The Council may suspend or cancel any person who contravenes the provisions of sub-regulation (1) of regulation 3 .

provisions.title: Forms
provisions.content: (1) Any person who intends to be registered, enrolled, or licensed under the Act shall fill in an appropriate form in optometry form - 4 set out in the second schedule to these Regulations. (2) The applicant shall, upon filling in the form, return them to the Registrar within the period set therein. (3) The Registrar shall, where an inquiry has been directed to be held, be required to serve the:— (a) alleged optometrist or ophthalmic optician or licensed person with a form of notice of an inquiry in optometry form - 1 set out in the second schedule to these Regulations; (b) witnesses with a form of summons to give evidence in optometry form - 2 set out in the second schedule to these Regulations; and (c) the concerned parties with a form of summons to produce documents set out in optometry form - 3 of Second Schedule of these Regulations (4) Any form shall not be issued unless such form bears the Seal of the Council. (5) The Registrar shall enter the particulars of all approved applications in an appropriate register, or roll set out in the Second Schedule to these Regulations. (6) Any registered, enrolled, or licensed optometry practitioner shall be required to retain his name in the register, roll or list by paying retention fee and filling an optometry form - 5 set out in the Second Schedule to these Regulations. (7) The Council shall, within forty five days upon receipt of retention fees issue an identity for practice in respect of Optometry Practitioner through the respective supervisors. First Schedule (Made under Regulation 3 (2)) Fees and charges A. S/No Activity Fees Payable I. Application forms TZS. 30,000.00 2. Full Registration TZS. 100,000.00 2.1 Provisional registration TZS. 60,000.00 2.2 Enrolment of Ophthalmic Optician TZS. 100,000.00 2.3 Temporary registration more than a 1 year (Non citizen) USD 500.00 2.4 Temporary registration < 1 year (Non citizen) USD 200.00 3. License to practise (No. 2, 2.1&2.2) TZS. 150,000.00 3.1 License to practise (No. 2.3) USD 1,500.00 4 Entering in the register any additional qualification TZS. 50,000.00 5. Retention fee 50% of registration/enrolment fees 6. Overdue retention fees (Penalty) 50% of retention fees 7. Renewal after 3 years 150% of registration/enrolment fees/license to practice 8. Certificate of good standing TZS. 100,000.00 9. Certificate of good standing non - citizen USD 100.00 10. Reinstatement fees (after 6 months -penalty). TZS. 100,000.00 B. Optometry Facility and Clinics Registration S/No Activity Fees payable 1 Registration for Private Optometry School TZS. 1,000,000.00 2. Registration for Optometry facility (surfacing unity or suppliers) TZS. 2,000,000.00 2.1 Registration for Optometry facility (surfacing unity or suppliers) (Non citizen) USD 5,000.00 3. Registration for optical laboratory TZS. 500,000.00 3.1 Registration for optical laboratory - non citizen TZS. 500,000.00 4. Registration for optometry clinic TZS. 150,000.00 4.1 Registration for optometry clinic - non citizen USD. 1,500.00 5. Annual retention fee facility, laboratory and clinic TZS. 50% of registration 5.1 Annual retention fee facility/laboratory (non citizen USD 50% of registration 6. Overdue retention fee 50% of registration Second Schedule (Made under Regulation 26(3)) Forms [Please note: Forms have not been reproduced. Please refer to the publication document.] Third Schedule Forms [Please note: Forms have not been reproduced.
